mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listening_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listening_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reading_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reading_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM writing_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM writing_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM speaking_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM speaking_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 1
SELECT AVG(total_score) FROM reading_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT AVG(total_score) FROM listening_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT AVG(ai_score) FROM writing_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND ai_score IS NOT NULL
SELECT AVG(overall_score) FROM speaking_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND overall_score IS NOT NULL

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listening_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND created_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 30 DAY) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reading_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND created_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 30 DAY) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM writing_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND created_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 30 DAY) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM speaking_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND created_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 30 DAY)
